zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Fulthorpe於1399年出生在英國越可爾希普斯維爾時，她的父親Sir William Fulthorpe32歲，母親Isabel de Lumley55歲。她於1420年與Nicholas Blakiston在英國英格蘭達勒姆結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1427年8月28日享年28歲。

zh-hans.Hipswell, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾希普斯維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Fulthorpe于1399年出生在英国越可爾希普斯維爾时，她的父亲Sir William Fulthorpe32岁，母亲Isabel de Lumley55岁。她于1420年与Nicholas Blakiston在英国英格兰達勒姆结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1427年8月28日享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fulthorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Fulthorpe in Grindon by Stockton on Tees (Durham).

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Fulthorpe was born in 1399, in Hipswell, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir William Fulthorpe, was 32 and her mother, Isabel de Lumley, was 55. She married Nicholas Blakiston in 1420, in Durham, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 28 August 1427, at the age of 28.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Fulthorpe est née en 1399, à Hipswell, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Fulthorpe, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Lumley, avait 55 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Blakiston en 1420, à Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 28 août 1427, à l’âge de 28 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Fulthorpe 1399 in Hipswell, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Fulthorpe 32 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Lumley 55. Sie hat 1420 in Durham, England, United Kingdom Nicholas Blakiston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 28. August 1427 im Alter von 28 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Fulthorpe è nata il nel 1399 nel Hipswell, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir William Fulthorpe, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Lumley, aveva 55 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Blakiston nel 1420, nel Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 28 agosto 1427, all'età di 28 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Fulthorpeが1399年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヒプスウエルで生まれた時，父Sir William Fulthorpeは32歳，母Isabel de Lumleyは55歳であった。1420年にイギリスイギリスダルハムでNicholas Blakistonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1427年8月28日に28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Fulthorpe(이)가 1399년 영국 요르크실르 히프스웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Fulthorpe(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Lumley(은)는 55세였다. 그녀는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람에서 Nicholas Blakiston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1427년 8월 28일 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Fulthorpe nasceu em 1399, em Hipswell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Fulthorpe, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Lumley, tinha 55 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Blakiston em 1420, em Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1427, com 28 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Fulthorpe родилась в 1399 г. в местности хипсвелл, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Fulthorpe было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Lumley, 55. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Blakiston в 1420 г. в местности дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 28 августа 1427 г. в возрасте 28 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Fulthorpe nació en 1399, en Hipswell, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Fulthorpe, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Isabel de Lumley, tenía 55 años. Se casó con Nicholas Blakiston en 1420, en Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 28 de agosto de 1427, a la edad de 28 años.
